teleporter_active.title: Activate your Create Teleporter — link two locations and confirm teleportation works

network_built.title: Build a second teleporter at a different location — establish a two-point teleporter network

teleport_base_to_end.title: Install a teleporter at your base AND at the End portal stronghold — instant access to the End

subtitle.text: You built a road in Ch12. You built a ship route in Ch16. Now you build a network that makes both obsolete.

description: The Create Teleporter network requires at least two linked teleporters.
Each teleporter uses a Quantum Mechanism and a registered location name.
Teleportation is instant — no travel time, no path.
The End portal stronghold is the pivot point of the entire game.
Instant access to it from your base collapses seventeen chapters of distance
The Via Romana roads from Ch12 are still useful for aesthetics and low-cost travel.
The teleporter network is for when time matters.
→ Build a second teleporter and link them [check]
→ Connect your base to the End portal stronghold [check]
